headline: Stop gaining, start losing—today sets the weekend tone
summary: You're +0.26 kg/week when you need -0.63 kg/week; today is the breakpoint before Friday snacking kicks in.
details: Eat only: 3 Huel meals and two portioned vegan snacks—no emotional buffer, no negotiation. Do 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today to reverse last week's +0.4 kg gain. This matters now: discipline today compounds through Friday–Sunday when you typically lose ground; build momentum to close the 0.89 kg/week gap.
